name: New Process Started with a Privileged Account
notes: This rule triggers when a new process is started with a privileged account.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
when the event matches Username IMATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
when any of File Hash (custom) are contained in any of ProcessHashesStartedAsSystemUser - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
TD_list: APPLY New Process Started with a Privileged Account on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001828) Process Create
AND when the event matches Username IMATCHES 'NT\sAUTHORITY\\SYSTEM' AQL filter query
AND NOT when any of File Hash (custom) are contained in any of ProcessHashesStartedAsSystemUser - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
RED_list: Event name: Detected a New Unseen Process Started with a System User Privileges
Event description: Detected a New Unseen Process Started with a System User Privileges
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
